englishDefinitions: Touching or pushing someone’s eye with a finger or pointed object.
Annoying or hurting someone by accidentally or repeatedly touching their eye area.
persianTranslation: زدن انگشت یا چیزی به چشمم
examples: Stop waving that pencil around; you’re poking me in the eye.
The baby kept poking me in the eye while I was holding him.
My sunglasses are broken and the frame is poking me in the eye.
